name: Acme Athletics
description: Acme Athletics is a place to play pickleball in Clarksville, TN. There are 12 indoor hard courts. Tape lines have been laid, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and water.
fees: Fee required — Free for members / $5 drop in for non members

name: Burt-Cobb Recreation Center
description: Burt-Cobb Recreation Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Clarksville, TN. There is 1 indoor wood court.

name: Clarksville Country Club
description: Clarksville Country Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Clarksville, TN. There are 4 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts. Players have access to restrooms, lights, and trainers or lessons.

name: Crow Recreation Center
description: Come play pickleball at Crow Recreation Center in Clarksville, TN! There is 1 indoor wood court.

name: Family Life Center
description: Family Life Center is a place to play pickleball in Clarksville, TN. There are 4 indoor hard and wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include food, locker rooms, restrooms, and water. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Fredonia community center
description: Fredonia community center is a place to play pickleball in Clarksville, TN. There are 6 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, lights, wheelchair accessibility, and water. The courts are free.

name: Swan Lake Tennis Complex
description: Come play pickleball at Swan Lake Tennis Complex in Clarksville, TN! There are 2 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.
